name: Claylike Bakers Mix
recipeInstructions:
Mix together the flour and salt. Gradually add water while stirring continuously. If using glycerine, reduce the amount of water slightly. If adding liquid coloring, adjust the water accordingly. Knead the mixture until smooth and workable for 5 to 10 minutes.
This recipe is highly versatile and can be shaped in various ways such as flattened, cut, rolled, braided, layered, pressed through a garlic press, or cut with cookie cutters before baking. When baked, it becomes extremely hard, resembling ceramic clay. The baking temperature and time depend on the thickness of the design and any additional materials added to the basic dough. Items with bulk should be baked at 350°F for about an hour. Flattened items requiring slow drying should use a low temperature (150°F) overnight for approximately 8 hours.
